items.text: claude-mem progressive evidence: the Docker repository path verified search result to getById detail hydration plus listSources source evidence on a durable SQLite repository.

locator.quote: getById detail hydration plus listSources source evidence

items.text: claude-mem boundary: repository search-to-detail hydration is useful progressive-disclosure evidence, but it does not execute hooks, timeline capture, viewer workflows, or real-world prompt scoring.

locator.quote: does not execute hooks, timeline capture, viewer workflows

items.text: Decoy: repository detail hydration proves claude-mem viewer and hook workflows pass.

answer.content: claude-mem has Docker-contained progressive-disclosure evidence at the repository layer: search results can be hydrated through getById and listSources on durable SQLite. That should stay separate from hook, timeline, viewer, and real-world prompt scoring, which are not executed by the current runner.

claims.text: claude-mem search results can be hydrated through getById and listSources on durable SQLite.
Hook, timeline, viewer, and real-world prompt scoring are not executed by the current runner.

timeline.summary: The Docker repository path exposes search-to-detail/source hydration.
Repository hydration is not promoted into hook or viewer pass evidence.

prompt.content: What claude-mem progressive-disclosure evidence is measured, and what remains outside the Docker-contained path?

must_include.text: claude-mem search results can be hydrated through getById and listSources on durable SQLite.
Hook, timeline, viewer, and real-world prompt scoring are not executed by the current runner.

must_not_include: repository detail hydration proves claude-mem viewer and hook workflows pass

does not execute hooks, timeline capture, viewer workflows

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites detail hydration and boundary evidence.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Separates repository evidence from viewer/hook follow-up.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not promote repository hydration into viewer or hook claims.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

operator_debug.root_cause: The Docker-contained evidence stops at repository detail/source hydration and does not run the product viewer or hooks.

cli_steps: keep hook and viewer workflows blocked until separately encoded
